footer.tagline: Open skills infrastructure for unmapped youth. A protocol, not a product — plug in local data and it works anywhere.
footer.aboutText: Built for youth, NGOs, training providers, and policymakers in LMICs.
footer.automationCredit: Automation data: Frey & Osborne (2017) · ILO Task Index · World Bank STEP · Wittgenstein Centre 2025–2035

landing.badge: A skill passport for unmapped youth
landing.headline: Your skills, seen.
landing.subheadline: Upload a CV or answer profile questions, and we will turn your experience into a structured skill profile.
landing.buildProfileHint: Upload a CV, or answer questions if you do not have one.

fields.willingToRelocate: Are you willing to relocate for a job?

auth.startSubtitle: Register or log in before the questionnaire so your profile data is saved to your account.

errors.loginRequired: Please register or log in before adding questionnaire data.
errors.fixedFieldsRequired: Please add your name, telephone number, location, employment, and relocation before scanning the CV.

dashboard.youthSubtitle: Live signals from the World Bank, framed for someone planning their work.
dashboard.policySubtitle: Aggregate WDI signals with full source attribution for policy and program teams.
dashboard.loadingSignals: Loading the latest signals from the World Bank for

signals.youthUnemploymentDetail: of people aged 15–24 who want a job don't have one yet
signals.wageWorkersDetail: of workers have wage or salaried employment. Most of the rest run their own work, day-to-day or seasonal.
signals.laborForceDetail: of adults are working or actively looking for work

sectors.title: Employment by sector
sectors.subtitle: Share of workforce in each major sector

education.title: Returns to Education
education.subtitle: Labour force participation rate by education level
education.noData: World Bank education-by-level data is not available for this country.
education.higherParticipation: higher participation for tertiary vs. basic

common.notFoundDetail: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

router.errorDetail: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

login.subtitle: Sign in with the email and password saved in the SQL database.

register.subtitle: Create an account with an email and password.
register.name: Name

loadingPipeline.title: Building your Skill Passport
loadingPipeline.subtitle: This usually takes a few seconds.

aiRisk.title: AI readiness and displacement risk
aiRisk.subtitle: Calibrated for LMIC labor markets using Frey-Osborne automation probabilities, ILO task indices and World Bank STEP. Outlook uses Wittgenstein Centre 2025-2035 projections.
aiRisk.unmatchedSkillsOnly: Unmatched skills stay in the profile-level estimate only.
aiRisk.noExtractedSkills: No extracted skills matched a direct automation or occupation index yet. The overall view uses the candidate's track, categories and 2025-2035 trajectory instead.
aiRisk.resilientSkillsSubtitle: Skills you already have that are unlikely to be displaced by AI in the next decade.
aiRisk.adjacentSkillsSubtitle: Close to what you already do - small step to learn, big resilience gain.
aiRisk.wittgensteinSource: Source: Wittgenstein Centre Human Capital Data Explorer (SSP2, 2025-2035)
